author: Chidera Ibe
name: Hypergradient SLOT-24
blurb: Replaces SLOT's fixed cosine LR with hypergradient descent (arXiv:2502.11229): LR adapts itself each step based on gradient alignment. When gradients are consistent, LR increases; when they flip, LR decreases. Built on PR #1313 base. Novel eval-time technique — no other submission uses hypergradient optimization for SLOT.
